movies.Title: Pillion
movies.Actors: Harry Melling, Alexander Skarsgård, Douglas Hodge
movies.Plot: A directionless man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.
movies.PlotES: Un hombre sin rumbo se enamora perdidamente de un enigmático y guapísimo motorista que lo toma como su sumiso.

movies.Title: Hoje Eu Quero Voltar Sozinho
movies.Actors: Ghilherme Lobo, Fabio Audi, Tess Amorim
movies.Plot: Leonardo is a blind teenager searching for independence. His everyday life, the relationship with his best friend Giovana, and the way he sees the world change completely with the arrival of Gabriel.
movies.PlotES: Leonardo es un adolescente ciego que busca independencia. Su vida cotidiana, la relación con su mejor amiga Giovana y la forma en que ve el mundo cambian por completo con la llegada de Gabriel.
